event_chain.label: Commander Alex Thorne opens the watch; Aurora coordinates canonical task distribution.
Docking Bay 2 logistics turnover validated and closed.
Hydroponics nutrient cycle adjustment validated and closed.
ORD dispatch order execution + Shadowfax inspection validated and closed.
Dome astronomy session calibration validated and closed.
Bay 2 departure clearance package validated and closed.
Ethics ledger reconciliation (Picard Delta 3) validated and closed.
EVA suit inspection cycle, core airlock validated and closed.
Zero-g lab safety check, core section validated and closed.
Comms array diagnostic, core mast validated and closed.
Habitat ring spin check (2 RPM / 0.3g verification) validated and closed.
Galley resupply intake from Bay 2 validated and closed.
Quantum core coherence check validated and closed.
Crew quarters environmental audit, ring sections validated and closed.
Dome observation watch handoff (ring Deck 4) validated and closed.
Life-support scrubber rotation, habitat ring validated and closed.
ORD pre-flight reconnaissance audit (Delta Scout) validated and closed.
L3 drift containment sweep validated and closed.
Command log review and Aurora arbitration sync validated and closed.
Cargo manifest reconciliation, Bay 2 intake validated and closed.
Ring stress telemetry review validated and closed.

hour 4: Lt. Commander Maya Shepard synergy with key collaborator (collaboration_boost) ×1.15
hour 4: Vincent Kale synergy with key collaborator (collaboration_boost) ×1.2
hour 4: Knowledge transfer across specializations (cross_pollination) ×1.05
ORD pre-flight reconnaissance dispatched (ORD-2 Delta Scout, ORD-3 Shadowfax).
Four-hour watch block: waves of routine operations, closeout, and continuity weave.
